The Story
ENGINEER.
BUILDER.
STRATEGIST.

I started with electrical engineering — control systems, signal processing, the physics underneath the machines. Then 18 months at Dana India Technical Centre commissioning a $590K dynamometer system, building Python pipelines, and creating analytics that global teams actually used.

Then I asked a harder question: what if the system could think? That led to LLMs, multi-agent orchestration, and eventually to Actin Technologies — where I'm now building ACTIN TraceiX, an AI-powered smart factory platform from the ground up.

Outside of work — F1 paddocks, racing go-karts I built myself, and exploring the world with the same precision I bring to engineering.

"It doesn't matter
where you start.
Build from there."
